channel.title: Tastings on Gourmand Syndrome
channel.description: Recent content in Tastings on Gourmand Syndrome

item.title: SAAM at The Bazaar
item.description: The SAAM at Bazaar by Jose Andres is well known for its take on molecular gastronomy. It’s located in the SLS Hotel off of La Cienega near West Hollywood. It’s filled with your typical pretentious and superficial Hollywood crowds. If you can get past that, there are 2 restaurants here of note: the regular restaurant where you can order tapas and the SAAM restaurant where it’s a 22 course prix fix taster.
